blended.narrative: Stoneham is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 39 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
